name: python3-pyvnc
title: python3-pyvnc
summary: client library for interacting with a VNC session (Python 3)
description:
client library for interacting with a VNC session (Python 3)
This package contains a client library for interacting programmatically (and
physically) with a VNC session. pyVNC Client that is built with Twisted-Python
and PyGame.
.
The client supports the following encodings: Hextile, CoRRE, RRE, RAW,
CopyRect.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pyvnc.py because client library for interacting with a VNC session (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pyvnc.py as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pyvnc.py [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pyvnc.py.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pyvnc.py with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pyvnc.py --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
